colors.name: Primary Turquoise
colors.usage: Primary brand color — hero/header fills, primary CTA buttons, links, active nav, logo frame. On white it is 3.38:1, so use only for large text (>=24px / >=18.66px bold) or UI/backgrounds, never body-size text.

colors.name: Primary Turquoise Dark
colors.usage: Hover/pressed state for primary teal elements and teal gradient end-stop (#2F99A4 -> #257880).

colors.name: Teal (text-safe)
colors.usage: Darker teal for teal-colored text at body size — 8.1:1 on white, passes AA/AAA. Use instead of #2F99A4 whenever teal appears as normal-size text.

colors.name: Accent Orange
colors.usage: Accent/highlight ONLY — never a dominant surface. Emphasis marks, callout left-borders, sparing secondary CTAs. 3.33:1 on white = large text/UI only.

colors.name: Text Anthracite
colors.usage: Primary ink — body copy, headlines, nav text, form labels, footer background. 6.96:1 on white (AA for all text).

colors.name: Text Anthracite Dark
colors.usage: AAA-grade body text (8.2:1 on white) when stronger contrast is wanted.

colors.name: Secondary Text
colors.usage: Muted/secondary text, metadata, captions on white.

colors.name: Background White
colors.usage: Primary page/card background; text color on teal or anthracite fills.

colors.name: Background Alt
colors.usage: Alternating section backgrounds and card surfaces to create quiet contrast against white.

colors.name: Border / Muted Grey
colors.usage: Borders, dividers, input outlines, disabled states. Never as text (1.59:1 on white).

colors.name: Border Light
colors.usage: Subtle hairline borders and table row separators.

colors.name: Error Red
colors.usage: Form validation / error states — semantic red, NOT brand orange, so errors never read as an accent.

footer.tagline: Netresearch DTT GmbH — leidenschaftlich, lösungsorientiert, zuverlässig

rules: Headlines, nav, buttons and taglines use Raleway (400/600/700); body copy, lists, forms and footer use Open Sans (400/600/700). Never set body paragraphs in Raleway. Full headline stack: 'Raleway','Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif.
Logo appears exactly once in the top header/nav. Minimum 32x32px; 40–56px recommended in a header. Preserve aspect ratio.

Never recolor, distort, rotate, crop, or add strokes/shadows/gradients/filters to the logo. Its only valid fills are frame #2F99A4 and inner-'n' #585961 (repo asset uses #595a62, an acceptable equivalent).
Clear space around the logo: at least 0.25x the logo width on every side.
If the logo is clickable it must link to https://www.netresearch.de/.
Turquoise is the primary color; orange (#FF4D00) is highlight-only and must never dominate a surface.
Do not use teal or orange for normal-size text on white (both ~3.3:1). Use #15585E for teal text and reserve #2F99A4/#FF4D00 for >=24px text, UI components, or fills with white text.
Body text uses anthracite #585961 on white (or #F5F5F5); never use light grey #CCCDCC for text.
Footer is mandatory and must contain the exact text 'Netresearch DTT GmbH' and a link to https://www.netresearch.de/.
Maintain high white space: >=48px padding around major sections, >=24px between content blocks, 1.6 line-height for body; content max-width <=1200px.
Meet WCAG AA: visible focus states, semantic structure, 4.5:1 for normal text / 3:1 for large text and UI.
No dark-mode palette is defined by the brand — it is a light-first system on white/#F5F5F5 backgrounds; do not invent dark-theme brand hexes.
No editorializing in on-page copy, commits, or docs — state what something is/does, avoid self-praise and narrating expected results.
